testCases.title: Verify page content and text elements
steps: Verify text 'A course to help you' is present in locator `page.locator('#preheader')`
Verify text 'SCRAPE ANY WEBSITE' is present in locator `page.locator('#header')`

Verify text 'Learn how to build your own web scrapers and
start collecting the data you need.' is present in locator `page.locator('#postheader')`
Verify text 'Build your first scraper in minutes!' is present in locator `page.locator('#subhero')`
Verify text 'Learn more about the course:' is present in locator `page.locator('#video')`
Verify text '© Hartley Brody' is present in locator `page.locator('#footer-content')`

testCases.title: Verify 'Get Started Now' link navigation
expected: User is redirected to Gumroad page.
